Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality.unionfind

Class SourceTable

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality.unionfind.SourceTable
public final class SourceTable extends Object
Source table for storing the source of fact equalities.

In the source table, there exists an entry for each fact equality that has been derived by the prover. Beside there exists an entry for each link node-parent in the union-find data structure.

  • Constructor Details

    • SourceTable

      public SourceTable()

  • Method Details

    • addSource

      public void addSource(Node node1, Node node2, Set<Source.FactSource> source)
      Adds the given set of fact source as a source of the equality between node1 and node2. Only adds it if there is no existing source between node1 and node2 which has a higher priority.

      Priority of sources are defined as such :

      • the source with the lowest level has the higher priority
      • if sources have the same level, smaller sources have higher priority
      Parameters:
      node1 - the first node
      node2 - the second node
      source - the source

    • addSource

      public void addSource(Node node1, Node node2, Source.FactSource source)
      Adds the given set of fact source as a source of the equality between node1 and node2. Only adds it if there is no existing source between node1 and node2 which has a higher priority.

      Priority of sources are defined as such :

      • smaller sources have higher priority
      • if sources have the same size, the one with the lowest level has the higher priority
      Parameters:
      node1 - the first node
      node2 - the second node
      source - the source

    • getSource

      public Set<Source.FactSource> getSource(Node node1, Node node2)
      Gets the source of the equality between the two given nodes.
      Parameters:
      node1 - the first node
      node2 - the second node
      Returns:
      the source of the equality between the two nodes

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clear this source table.

    • dump
